items: Oral Communication on Closed Session Items Only
If you have public comments related to a Closed Session item, please post it on the links under Public Content prior to the Closed Session Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.

CONFERENCE WITH REAL PROPERTY NEGOTIATORS (Gov. Code, 54956.8) Property: 750 Bradford St, Redwood City, CA 94063 Agency negotiators: John Baker, Superintendent, Peter Ingram, Consultant, and Clarissa Canady, Legal Counsel, Negotiating parties: Redwood City School District and The Sobrato Organization Under negotiation: Price and terms of payment of Property Exchange Agreement
Reconvene to Regular Session at Approximately 7:00 p.m.
Report Out on Closed Session from December 19, 2023
Welcome by the School Board President, Janet Lawson
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 9.0 (Staff Recognition) was added as a new agenda item. The posted item 19 (Recognition of Cecilia I. Márquez) was renumbered to 9.1. President Lawson stated: 'I would like to add a 9.2 recognition of another board member' and later clarified 'can I add it 9.3?' which was then adjusted to '9.0 staff recognition.' This reordering was approved when the board voted to approve the agenda.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Okay, we are back. So we are on item 10.1, approval of consent items. Is there a motion to approve?
